name: markdown-converter-compdf
tagline: ClawHub (102★): Process, convert, edit, and extract data from PDF files using the ComPDF Cloud API. Supports format conversion (Word, Excel
verdict: Main weakness: no out-of-scope guidance across more than 50 conversion operations, so misfiring against adjacent PDF/document tasks is plausible. It also has no real version tracking, and the description ends in a keyword-stuffed tail that reads as SEO filler rather than useful guidance.

highlights.summary: Neither the description nor the body contains any 'NOT for' / 'out of scope' / pointer-to-other-skill exclusion, despite covering 50+ operations where misfire against adjacent PDF/
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, no dated revision notes anywhere in the document; 'server/v2' on line 59/93 refers to the ComPDF API version, not the skill's
Description is informative and states real capabilities, but this trailing keyword-stuffing tail bolted onto the folded description reads as SEO filler and pushes the whole field t
